scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:wasm && pnpm run test:types && pnpm run test:storybook
scripts.compile:stories: rm -rf stories/compiled/.emited && cargo build && ./target/debug/elemix-compiler --dirs tests/fixtures --out stories/compiled/.emited && cp tests/fixtures/*.scss stories/compiled/.emited/
scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --no-default-features --features wasm && node scripts/wasm-pkg.mjs
scripts.test:wasm: pnpm run build:wasm && node tests/wasm-conformance.mjs && node tests/wasm-robustness.mjs
scripts.storybook: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run compile:stories && storybook dev -p 6006
scripts.build-storybook: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run compile:stories && storybook build
